item.title: Your cat is basically a living sundial. ☀️🐱 They will follow every patch of sunlight in your house all day long, and there's a real reason for it. Cats aren't great at regulating their own body temperature, so that warm sunny spot isn't just cozy. It's ne
item.description: By @jacksongalaxy: Your cat is basically a living sundial. ☀️🐱 They will follow every patch of sunlight in your house all day long, and there's a real reason for it. Cats aren't great at regulating their own body temperature, so that warm sunny spot isn't just cozy. It's ne
